meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve Slow Dev Speed
content.seo_description: Overcome slow development speed with this Git-based AI workflow. A beginner-friendly checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code for faster shipping.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development speed, integrate AI directly into your Git workflow. By using Antigravity for automated code generation and Claude Code for CLI-based iteration, you transform your terminal into an autonomous engine. This reduces context switching, automates boilerplate, and allows you to ship production-ready features in hours, not days.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and your cursor is blinking on a blank IDE. Every second spent wrestling with syntax or boilerplate is a second stolen from your profit margin. The industry calls it 'development speed,' but you know it as the friction between your ambition and the deployment button.

It’s time to stop writing code like it’s 2015. By embedding AI agents into your Git repository, you turn your terminal into a force multiplier. This isn't just about writing code faster; it's about shifting your role from a manual laborer to an architectural lead, letting AI handle the heavy lifting while you focus on the logic that actually pays the bills.

steps.title: Initialize Intelligent Repo Context
steps.description: Establish a deep context for your AI by structuring your repository with clear READMEs and architectural specs before invoking your tools.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this directory structure and generate a comprehensive architecture.md that outlines the core business logic and database schema for a SaaS boilerplate.

steps.title: Automated Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Stop manually creating boilerplate files. Use Antigravity to generate entire feature modules based on your existing project patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a new feature module for user authentication including controller, service, and repository layers following the existing project folder structure.

steps.title: AI-Driven Git Commits
steps.description: Stop writing manual commit messages. Use AI to analyze your diffs and generate semantic, professional commit messages automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the changes in the current git diff into a structured conventional commit message format including a brief explanation of impact.

steps.title: Contextual Bug Remediation
steps.description: Instead of manual debugging, pipe your error logs directly into Claude Code to identify the root cause and generate a fix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following stack trace and suggest a patch that prevents this memory leak in the data processing loop.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'fix error found in server.log'

steps.title: Rapid Refactoring Cycles
steps.description: Refactor legacy code safely by creating a temporary branch and having the AI suggest modularization improvements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this monolithic function into three distinct, testable utility functions without changing the external API signature.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor main.ts for better modularity'

pro_tips: Always create a .claudeignore file to prevent the AI from indexing massive dependency folders or sensitive credential files.
Use 'dry-run' flags whenever available in your CLI tools to inspect the AI's proposed changes before they touch your filesystem.
Maintain a 'knowledge-base' folder in your repo that contains your project's specific style guide to keep AI outputs consistent.
Pipe your unit test results directly into the AI prompt to force it to write code that actually passes your suite on the first try.
Use the 'diff' output of your AI tools to perform a quick mental code review; treat the AI as a junior dev, not a replacement for your expertise.
content.next_steps: Now that your workflow is automated, audit your current project for the next high-friction area and create a custom prompt library to handle it in seconds.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the code and start orchestrating it. You have the tools, the strategy, and the power to double your output. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
